function.name: data_export
function.description: Export selected data for external analysis. Supports multiple formats including CSV, GeoJSON, NetCDF, and KML.

layer_name.description: The name of the layer to export (e.g., 'SWOT November 2024', 'ICESat-2 freeboard')

geographical_area.description: The geographical area to export (e.g., 'Beaufort Sea', 'current view'). Defaults to current view.

resolution.description: Data resolution for export (default 'medium'). Lower resolution = smaller file size.

include_metadata.description: Whether to include metadata in the export (default true)

auto_download.description: Whether to automatically trigger file download (default false)

time_range.description: Optional time range for temporal filtering

ui.title: Exporting Data
ui.details: Preparing data export in the requested format
